programme.title: Talk With World Leaders (III)
programme.desc: TALK WITH WORLD LEADERS: Talk With World Leaders reveals compelling insights into key international figures in the fields of politics, industry, business, science and the arts, giving Chinese audiences a closer look at the world leaders.

programme.title: Last Hero In China
programme.desc: Wong Fei Hong investigates why lots of village girls have gone missing and discovers that it's organised by the law enforcer. A big fight ensures between Wong and the bad guys...

programme.title: Affectionately Yours
programme.desc: Aran is an honest person. He leads an ordinary life and is quite successful with his business. However, when his girlfriend leaves him, chaos begins. He feels depressed and disheartened. Aran finds his friend Ruddy for comfort. Ruddy's sister Connie has always been interested in Aran so Ruddy and his friend contrive a 'trap' for Aran. Aran is forced to marry Connie. Aran and Connie visit Japan for their honeymoon. It is where Aran learns of the scheme and meets Atsuko who really steals his heart...

programme.title: Legacy Of Rage
programme.desc: Brandon Ma, a regular guy working in Hong Kong, who is set up by his drug-dealing best friend Michael, to take the rap for the murder of an undercover cop. Michael also has eyes for Brandon's girl, May. While Brandon languishes in jail, May gives birth to their child and flees to Brazil to avoid the lurid clutches of Michael, who has become a big crime boss. Brandon gets out of prison after eight years, learns the truth, and goes after Michael for revenge...

programme.title: Warrior Mothers: Who Is The Craftiest
programme.desc: Leung Piu a swindler, cheats Yue Nan out of his life savings. This leads to Yue Nan's death, leaving his daughter Winnie behind. The Kang family, long disgusted by Leung's treachery, vow to avenge Yue Nan. They decide to “fight deceit with deceit”, exploiting Leung's greed to lure him into a trap, but Leung outsmarts Kang family. As the conflict escalates, Leung continuously sows discord between Kang's brothers Mon and Chuen. When Leung believes he has triumphed by triggering infighting within Kang family...

programme.title: E32 - Mirror
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.title: E9 - Livret A, Life Insurance: Where Is Our Money Going?
programme.desc: The money invested by the French in booklets or life insurance contracts does not sleep. It is invested. But the contributors have no right of scrutiny over the investments made. If the banks promise investments without oil or <<sustainable development>>, the system remains completely opaque. Investigation.

programme.desc: Glitch races the Go Jetters across the Academy to find the lost G.O. Dome of the Ancients.

programme.title: E2 - Mojo Rocks
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: E16 - Robotato
programme.desc: Evil Pea has trapped Supertato and replaced him with an evil robot lookalike called Robotato.

programme.title: E3 - The Shape Badge
programme.desc: It is a lovely day and the squirrels are playing outside. They are playing the shape game. Working out which shape goes where is quite tricky.

programme.title: E4 - The Juice Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is going to make the squirrels juice from the garden. Whilst picking the fruit, the squirrels meet a little bug, full of woes about being too small.

programme.title: E5 - I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: E6 - Potato Time
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: E27 - Musical Statues
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: E2 - Chucklesome Trucks
programme.desc: When Rebecca works with the Troublesome Trucks, everyone expects the worst, but she defies everyone's expectations and has a very amusing day.

programme.title: E4 - Panicky Percy
programme.desc: Percy causes confusion for everyone and prompts delays, when he spends too much time panicking over nothing.

programme.title: E29 - Go Jet Academy: Map Readers
programme.desc: Glitch races the Go Jetters across the Academy to find the lost G.O. Dome of the Ancients.

programme.title: E2 - Mojo Rocks
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: E3 - Got Your Goat
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: E16 - Robotato
programme.desc: Evil Pea has trapped Supertato and replaced him with an evil robot lookalike called Robotato.

programme.title: E3 - The Shape Badge
programme.desc: It is a lovely day and the squirrels are playing outside. They are playing the shape game. Working out which shape goes where is quite tricky.

programme.title: E4 - The Juice Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is going to make the squirrels juice from the garden. Whilst picking the fruit, the squirrels meet a little bug, full of woes about being too small.

programme.title: E5 - I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E24 - Wagon Ride
programme.desc: Bluey can't wait to get to the monkey bars as Dad takes her and Bingo on a wagon ride to the park. But her patience is tested when Dad keeps stopping to chat with other grown-ups.

programme.title: E2 - Aardvark
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to the Kalahari Desert, in Southern Africa on a global adventure in search of the elusive aardvark.

programme.title: E1 - Collisions
programme.desc: Observe the natural and human forces that have shaped Ningaloo Reef, Cape Range, and Exmouth Gulf with Tim, Traditional Owners, and other experts. Check out a million-year-old fossil reef, a gargantuan fish, and a ray that packs quite a punch.

programme.title: E2 - Tidal Territory
programme.desc: Battle for dominion over the river with crocs, then catch glimpses of an ultra-rare mangrove snake and an endangered nabarlek wallaby. Take to the ocean to see humpback whale mothers raise their calves, then be hunted by false killer whales.

programme.desc: Dash across southeast Queensland as breeding and snake-catching season ramp up. Watch Adele and Mick go up against an eastern brown, the second deadliest snake in the world, while Stu and Liv tangle with a carpet python.

programme.title: E2 - Escape to the Deep
programme.desc: Count down the seconds as the sun sets and predators prowl around the pool before the tide finally rolls in. Persevere as night falls with a kleptomaniacal slug and an acrobatic scallop, while a pair of sneaky crabs take a dangerous shot at romance.

programme.title: E2 - Great Escape
programme.desc: Experience life on the farm as things heat up for summer. Watch animals swelter in a rare heatwave, try to stay cool in the nearby freshwater stream, and stash supplies for fall.

programme.desc: The beaches of California are some of the most beautiful in the world, but are they falling out of balance due to mankind’s effects on nature? What does it take for the magnificent fauna of the Pacific Coast to keep living… on the “living beach”?

programme.title: The Pregnancy Scheme
programme.desc: Pregnant and newly single, Julia faces a catastrophe when she loses her job. A lifeline arrives in the form of her new friend Alana, who says she knows people who would pay for positive pregnancy tests.

programme.title: E72 - Dallas: Beechmont
programme.desc: Derek and Chauncey buy a bug infested zombie with high hopes of turning it around. But when they encounter plumbing problems and an actual burglary, will their high hopes of a profitable flip be smashed?

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: Junho, who had chosen a ₩7,500-per-night room during their last Vietnam trip, is back as the lodging dokbakja for their Thailand adventure. With both excitement and anxiety, the Dokbakz follow Junho.

programme.title: E16 - Liz And Chris
programme.desc: Liz and Chris have both enjoyed living near the ocean and want to provide their three kids with the same experience. However, they have different opinions on how much to spend to make this dream a reality.

programme.title: I Thought My Husband's Wife Was Dead
programme.desc: Wife and expectant mother Lola seems to have it all: the big house, a dashing husband, and a thriving restaurant. But Lola's perfect life is interrupted when a ghost from the past suddenly shows up.

programme.title: E16 - Liz And Chris
programme.desc: Liz and Chris have both enjoyed living near the ocean and want to provide their three kids with the same experience. However, they have different opinions on how much to spend to make this dream a reality.

programme.title: E4 - Lamb Meatballs With Herby Couscous & Cardamom Snickerdoodles
programme.desc: Jake makes his sweet and savoury lamb meatballs with pearled couscous. It's a recipe so versatile you can use nearly any ingredient you have on hand. It isn't a one-pan dish, but it might as well be!

programme.title: E41 - Soy Meat Asian Tacos
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a flavourful Korean-style taco with a spicy, soy-based recipe that perfectly combines salty and sweet ingredients.

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: After dinner at the Luang Prabang Bamboo Restaurant, the Dokbakz head back to their accommodation, only to find that the entrance has turned into a flooded mess from the heavy rain.

programme.title: Trailblazing
programme.desc: The feature program 'Trailblazing' on Shenzhen TV fully illustrates Shenzhen's trailblazing exploration and demonstration role as a pilot demonstration zone for socialism with Chinese characteristics. Through the micro recording approach and small entry points in character stories, the program showcases stories of trailblazing exploration and pioneering efforts in Shenzhen, reflecting the major theme of China's high-quality development.

programme.title: E154
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. programme.title: E221
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America's top CEOs, CNBC's Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today's most influential companies.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Delivered! - The Courier Driver Business
programme.desc: In many German cities, bicycle couriers deliver burgers, pizza, and other food to people's homes. Thousands of these riders come from India, lured by the promise of studying in Germany, and have incurred heavy debts.

programme.title: E6 - Ready-To-Wear Fashion Shows/Ai In Fashion/Le Chemin Des Maquettes
programme.desc: A look back at the ready-to-wear shows for Autumn-Winter 2025-2026 from Mossi Traore to Paco Rabanne and Enfants Riches Deprimes. AI is making its mark in fashion as stylists, art directors and clothing designers. Le Chemin des Maquettes makes metal fashion pieces for some of the world's top designers.

programme.title: E35 - Grillemont - Le Clos Luce
programme.desc: The Grillemont castle, near Tours, is a former fortress transformed into an 18th-century residence. The Clos Luce, also near Tours, is famous for having been the home of the renowned Leonardo da Vinci.

programme.title: E11 - Ursula Caruel/Tree Embolism/Langres Landscape
programme.desc: Contents: Ursula Caruel, an artist inspired by the herbarium, for a local and nomadic art form; tree embolism; the landscapes of the Langres plateau; Don't panic with Marie-Laure.

programme.title: E12 - Julien Fournie
programme.desc: He's rewriting the rules for haute couture: Julien Fournie's autumn-winter 2023-2024 haute couture collection is called ''Premier bouclier'', a hymn to powerful femininity, offering a new take on military clothing.

programme.desc: The Grillemont castle, near Tours, is a former fortress transformed into an 18th-century residence. The Clos Luce, also near Tours, is famous for having been the home of the renowned Leonardo da Vinci.

programme.title: E11 - Ursula Caruel/Tree Embolism/Langres Landscape
programme.desc: Contents: Ursula Caruel, an artist inspired by the herbarium, for a local and nomadic art form; tree embolism; the landscapes of the Langres plateau; Don't panic with Marie-Laure.

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E19 - Duel At The Corn Field/Cancan Loves The Swing
programme.desc: The Bobobobobone is somewhere in the corn field. It seems like an endless search, but luckily, it’s found without much trouble. Deca starts attacking Shiro with a machine.

programme.title: E105 - The Immaterialists/A Sizable Problem
programme.desc: Wanda entrusts Mo and Sam with a strange crystal, Sam keeps it under the pretext that she will not lose it. But after a mishap, it gets out of her reach… She asks for the power to go through wall to recover it.

programme.title: E14 - A. Loyalty to the King/Blood Under the Skin/It Came from the Nightosphere/The Eyes/St
programme.desc: There's a new 'Nice King' in Ooo, and he looks kinda like someone else we know.

programme.title: E133 - Telephone Pole Gags 2: Shrinking Telephone Pole / In The Road Again!/Happy Birdy To Y
programme.desc: Tweety spies a puddy from his perch.

programme.title: E74 - The Romantic/The Uploads/The Wicked/The Origins - Pt 1/The Origins - Pt 2
programme.desc: After Gumball convinces himself that Penny doesn't love him as much as she used to, he decides to put together a romantic quest to remind her of all the good times they've had together. But Gumball's romantic gesture backfires, landing Penny - and maybe their relationship - in serious peril.

programme.title: E125 - Room For Ruby/Lion 4: Alternate Ending/Doug Out
programme.desc: Steven's Gem family continues to grow.

programme.title: Darwin's Big Air!
programme.desc: Darwin wants to get big air on his BMX bike, so Heni and Newts help him practice!

programme.title: Three, Two, One Blast Off
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts build a three-stage rocket to send a camera high above the clouds to photograph Matariki.

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Party Popper
programme.desc: When helium balloons for Tess's fashion show start inexplicably popping, she is upset and asks Addison to help her figure out the cause and stop the rest of the balloons from popping before her show is RUINED!!

programme.title: Dominos
programme.desc: Amazing idea after other, that's how it goes with these Dominos!

programme.title: Blackout - Part I
programme.desc: The excessive use of energy during hot summer can result in blackouts in many places. New York City is at risk of a dangerous total blackout. The MeteoHeroes must save the many people in danger and find a way to restore power!

programme.title: Paranormal Smashtivity
programme.desc: When Bryan and Helen leave town - and Chelsea in charge - spooky things start to happen. Can Max and Kaylyn explain these occurrences with science and prove it's not a ghost? Meanwhile, Alicia helps Noodles get over his Friday the 13th curse.

programme.title: Explosive Spots!
programme.desc: The doctors get snotted in Ouchology, we meet new Oucher Isaac, and join an incredible emergency service at work in Australia, the Flying Doctors!

programme.title: Stepping Into The Unknown
programme.desc: Trampoline gymnast Theo has been getting used to competing at big competitions and has been selected to compete at the British Championships in a few weeks. However, he has a huge challenge ahead of him.

programme.title: The G.O.A.T (Roger Federer) and The Racer (Danica Patrick)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, tennis legend, French Open, and Grand Slam winner, Roger Federer, and the world's most successful woman in Indy car racing, Danica Patrick, share their stories on becoming the best in the world.

programme.title: Math is Everywhere
programme.desc: This episode explores mathematical patterns in nature, such as the tessellating hexagonal units of a honeycomb, the bilateral symmetry of a leaf, and the radial symmetry of a snowflake and spider web. Math really is everywhere!

programme.title: Babycritters Club
programme.desc: When Heni runs a dance for all the local animals, Darwin and Newts mind their babies, but they run off so the kids have to learn about their habitats in order to find them.

programme.title: Building Fortified Castles
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, castles are built to protect their residents from danger. Lord Roach wants to have his castle fitted with every single type of defense system. Howle r- his architect, loves the idea. But there is something that may ruin the construction process.

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Babycritters Club
programme.desc: When Heni runs a dance for all the local animals, Darwin and Newts mind their babies, but they run off so the kids have to learn about their habitats in order to find them.

programme.title: The G.O.A.T (Roger Federer) and The Racer (Danica Patrick)

programme.title: The Mystery of the Party Popper
programme.desc: When helium balloons for Tess's fashion show start inexplicably popping, she is upset and asks Addison to help her figure out the cause and stop the rest of the balloons from popping before her show is RUINED!!

programme.title: Dominos
programme.desc: Amazing idea after other, that's how it goes with these Dominos!

programme.title: Hermit Crab - There's No Place Like Home
programme.desc: The crab loses its shell and being out in the open is scary for him; he does everything he can to stay hidden when searching for his lost home, but discovers that even seagrass can be scary when you are afraid of everything.

programme.title: Communicating without Wires
programme.desc: How come we can't hear people talking next to us when we're in the sea? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of sound. Have hands-on fun by making a basic phone, and get to know Guglielmo Marconi, a physicist and inventor – ‘the father of radio'.

programme.title: Mapping and Levels
programme.desc: How come we see the Earth as flat when we know it's round? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of geography. Have hands-on fun by making a carpenter's level, and get to know Kim Jeong-ho, a cartographer who created the first detailed map of Korea.

programme.title: The Metric System
programme.desc: The Metric System is a universal way to measure length, weight, volume, time, electricity and temperature. It is used widely today in countries all over the world, and is also the standard in the science community and is crucial to global industry. But how does it work?

programme.title: In a spin!
programme.desc: Dr. Xand gets in a spin to show you why you get dizzy, the Flying Doctors help a new baby in Australia, and Dr. Raph takes an icy dip when he meets a Brilliant Body who swims in the Antarctic.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met.... a Base Ball Bat
programme.desc: Henry meets a Baseball bat in a sports shop but Baseball Bat has never played in a championship game before.

programme.title: Indecision
programme.desc: Teresa uses Kemii Indecision Sludge to render her parents, and Max and his friends, totally incapable of making a decision, then goes about enacting her plan to shut down the town's decision-making ability.

programme.title: In a spin!
programme.desc: Dr. Xand gets in a spin to show you why you get dizzy, the Flying Doctors help a new baby in Australia, and Dr. Raph takes an icy dip when he meets a Brilliant Body who swims in the Antarctic.

programme.title: What's Over the Rainbow?
programme.desc: The rainbow we see depends on our viewpoint in relation to the sun. Red has the longest wavelength of visible light and violet has the shortest. All rainbows are actually circular, but from the ground we can normally only see the upper part of the circle.

programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.title: E11 - 英倫男被三女圍攻？
programme.desc: 熟齡戀愛旅居真人秀，10位性格各異、魅力全開的50+熟齡男女，帶著一顆敢愛的心，從大理到泰國，在日落時分開啟一段愛情之旅，一同打破恐老焦慮，傳遞歲月從不敗熱愛的生活態度。

programme.title: E11 - 豪華約會 曖昧升溫
programme.desc: 以「尋找勢均力敵的參與者」為核心模式，通過團隊協作任務獲取生存物資，個人競技爭奪約會權，並設置淘汰機制與心動投票綁定規則；素人嘉賓們將逃離都市，直面愛情與生存的挑戰，在人群中尋找勢均力敵的彼此。

programme.title: E11 - 英倫男被三女圍攻？

programme.title: E3 - 音樂神童6歲開始創作寫歌
programme.desc: 由張紹剛與熒熒、陳爍等嘉賓主持組成學習團的一檔兒童脱口秀節目，一同走入「了不起學校」，發掘每個了不起孩子身上的天真、萌趣和了不起的技能。

programme.title: E3 - 超難數學題目
programme.desc: 邀請了馬清運、伊能靜、楊芸晴等嘉賓擔任「超腦護航員」；節目根據“八大未來力”的概念來進行項目設置，少年們需要用創造性思維激發想像力，利用從紙筆到程式設計來破解難題，從而喚醒大腦活力，選拔出最具“未來力”的少年。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! programme.title: E526
programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! This reality program warmly portrays their concerns about jobs, marriage, and parenting while living in Korea.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: E17

Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: E17 - Dead Ringer
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Citizen Pinoy
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: Millionaire Thornton Melon’s (Rodney Dangerfield) son is a college misfit, so Thornton lends some fatherly support...by enrolling as a fellow freshman! Who cares if he never finished high school? Thornton’s pockets are deep enough to buy his way in! But when he steals his professor’s girlfriend (Sally Kellerman), Thornton goes just a little too far. Now, he’ll have to hit the books, instead of his bank account – or go back to being the world’s wealthiest dropout!

programme.title: The Specialist
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone and Sharon Stone star in this hard-edged thriller about an ex-CIA explosives expert (Stallone) who helps a seductive beauty (Stone) avenge the murder of her parents by a powerful Cuban-American crime boss.

programme.title: E5 - JJ's Big 'On The Move' Dance Party!
programme.desc: Get ready for a dance party that's always on the move! Join JJ, Cody & Nina as they groove to 'Wheels on the Bus' while a real bus travels in the background. Then, it's time to line up & pretend to be a train, chugging along to the 'Train Song'! The adventure continues as the kids put on their fire hats & sing about being brave firefighters with a big red firetruck. From the 'Animal Song' to seeing vehicles on the street, it's a high-energy dance party!

programme.title: E1 - Fruits, Cupcakes, Snacks & Ice Cream!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy adventures with fruits, cupcakes, snacks & ice cream! Pogo wants to pick a delicious fruit from a tree, but he hilariously learns that he has to be patient & wait for it to ripen! Then, Lulu is determined to bake a cupcake all by herself, but her mixture turns into a giant cupcake blob that takes over the Playpod! Plus, Fuse is craving a snack but can't get the box open & Pogo's ice cream keeps melting!

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: E2 - The Most Unpredictable Magic Mishaps!
programme.desc: Get ready for the most unpredictable magic mishaps! First, Magic Pet Chroma accidentally takes away all the colors from the city, & Morphle must morph into a magic paintbrush to paint them all back. Then, Professor Paula's new youth serum is accidentally spilled on Mila, turning her into a baby! Now Morphle has to look after baby Mila while an antidote is created. The mishaps continue as giant bubbles carry away citizens & a giant living doll causes chaos!

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: E2 - Funny Feelings & Creative Fixes!
programme.desc: It's a day of funny feelings & creative fixes! A worried Dandy brings Fiona to the garage because her lights & sirens aren't working. Gecko discovers no fix is needed because Fiona is just feeling sad inside. Then, when Blue is anxious about school because Bobby doesn't look like the bus in his book, Gecko comes up with a creative plan to let the Mechs paint Bobby! Plus, Gecko finds a creative way to deal with a swarm of bees that have nested in Trevor's engine.

programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E5 - JJ's Big 'On The Move' Dance Party!
programme.desc: Get ready for a dance party that's always on the move! Join JJ, Cody & Nina as they groove to 'Wheels on the Bus' while a real bus travels in the background. Then, it's time to line up & pretend to be a train, chugging along to the 'Train Song'! The adventure continues as the kids put on their fire hats & sing about being brave firefighters with a big red firetruck. From the 'Animal Song' to seeing vehicles on the street, it's a high-energy dance party!

programme.title: E1 - Solving the Biggest Mysteries!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are on the case, solving the biggest mysteries in town! When Aunt Augustine's new necklace is stolen, Detective Mila & Morphle find clues to track down the culprits. Then, Winston & the Bandits steal a time machine & use it to go to the future! Mila & Morphle must follow them to get it back. The mysteries continue as the Bandits steal Morphle & the friends must find him, & a body swap device causes a confusing mix-up!

programme.title: E1 - Fruits, Cupcakes, Snacks & Ice Cream!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy adventures with fruits, cupcakes, snacks & ice cream! Pogo wants to pick a delicious fruit from a tree, but he hilariously learns that he has to be patient & wait for it to ripen! Then, Lulu is determined to bake a cupcake all by herself, but her mixture turns into a giant cupcake blob that takes over the Playpod! Plus, Fuse is craving a snack but can't get the box open & Pogo's ice cream keeps melting!

programme.title: Love Lies
programme.desc: 'Love, once believed, is real.' Despite being swindled out of a large sum of money, the well-known gynecologist Yu still insisted that she was in love. Yu, who had been widowed for several years, met Joe, who was disguised as a middle-aged French petroleum engineer and widower, on a dating app, not knowing that he was part of an online scam group. Not only was Yu immersed in the online romance, but Joe also found pleasure and satisfaction in creating romantic experiences for Yu. Two initially unlikable people gradually changed through this online romance that began with deception.

programme.title: The Vanished Murderer
programme.desc: A women's prison in the Northern China in 1932, Prisoner FU Yuan (JIANG Yiyan) digs a tunnel in her prison cell with a silver spoon and escapes. Inspector SONG Donglu (LAU Ching-wan) is summoned to investigate FU's escape. By tracking down the letters sent to him by FU, it sets SONG off to Hong City to unravel FU's disappearance.

programme.title: Beyond The Sin
programme.desc: One rainy night, the dead body of a girl, the only daughter of Hong Kong police Yin Lok, is found in the wild. Polices based on clues, suspect has been identified. However, several more girls are murdered and murder cases keep happening. Yin begins to investigate his daughter's death and met a mentally retarded girls, he is looking for more clues from this special girl. Finally, Yin is getting closer to the truth...

programme.title: Visible Secret II
programme.desc: Jack is laden with ominous anxiety the moment he and his bride Ching step into the new apartment they recently purchase at a suspiciously low price. For one thing, his new neighbors are not only unfriendly but downright creepy. Notwithstanding Jack's miraculous recovery from a near fatal accident by a hit-and-run driver outside his building, everything starts going downhill from this point forward. On the one hand, the image of a gruesome female cadaver pops in and out of Jack's vision whenever he sneezes. On the other, Ching starts behaving most bizarrely, as if she is being possessed...

programme.title: Expect a Miracle
programme.desc: Miss Sung has come to Hong Kong to be a teacher, and hopefully moonlight as a model. On the Internet, she starts to talk with 'Blue Moon', a photographer. While attempting to shoot, the two have an argument, and Sung seems to lose her chance at being a model, until a second consideration by Jet leads to a completed shoot. Love between the two begins to bloom, but Jet's stepsister, who is also one of Miss Sung's students, starts to interfere, and may just ruin everything.

programme.title: Let it Ghost
programme.desc: This anthology film features a triplet of horror stories starring up-and-coming actors and popular local Youtubers. When a film crew is haunted by paranormal activities, the director decides to cast her to play a ghost; When a taxi driver takes his girlfriend to a party room to get it on, a horny ghost adds spice to the proceedings; When a wandering ghost refuses to leave a soon-to-be-gentrified mall, the tenants concoct a plan to send her off.
